title: SEIYA
overview: After exhibiting special powers, Seiya is approached by the enigmatic Alman Kido, who urges him to fulfill his destiny and become a Bronze Knight.

title: Burn Your Cosmo
overview: Seiya obtains the Pegasus Armor with ease, but to be a true Knight of Athena, he must first prove himself in the Galaxian Wars tournament.

title: Enter the Dragon
overview: Believing in the dark prophecy, Magnus confronts Lady Sienna. Seiya faces his toughest opponent yet: Dragon Long.

title: Nebula Chain
overview: Reluctant to fight, Andromeda Shaun takes a defensive approach against Unicorn Jab using her Nebula Chain. Meanwhile, Vander's army attacks.

title: The Black Knights
overview: Seiya takes down a helicopter to retrieve the stolen Gold Armor from Phoenix Nero, only to be confronted by Vander's Black Knights.

title: Phoenix Rising
overview: Phoenix Nero has built up his overwhelming power with hate. To stop him, the Bronze Knights must combine their strength to reclaim the Gold Armor.

title: The Prophecy
overview: Graad assembles his own Black Knights to protect mankind from the gods. When his forces abduct Sienna, the Bronze Knights set out to rescue her.

title: One War Ends, Another Begins
overview: The Bronze Knights face Graad's upgraded Black Knights. Though Seiya and the others gain the upper hand, Graad proves to be a formidable foe.

title: The Twelve Houses
overview: Athena is attacked by a godslayer arrow and Seiya and company must fight against the Gold Knights to save her.

title: The Seventh Sense
overview: Seiya faces Aldebaran in the House of Taurus to go ahead and save Athena, but his rival is really powerful.

title: Andromeda Island
overview: While Seiya and the others have trouble dealing with Gemini, the action also takes place on Andromeda Island.

title: Cold Hearted
overview: Shun confronts the Gemini Gold Knight while Hyoga mysteriously reappears before Camus, his former master.

title: The Land of the Dead
overview: Shiryu goes ahead and arrives at the House of Cancer, where his corresponding Gold Knight is waiting for him ready to kill him.

title: Battle for the House of Leo
The One as Powerful as a God
The Cygnus and the Scorpion
overview: Seiya and his friends arrive at the House of Scorpio and engage in a deadly battle with the Gold Knight, Milo.

title: Jab's Courage
overview: Former rivals of the Bronze Knights, Jabu and the others come together to help the goddess Athena.

title: Return to the Land of the Dead
overview: Although there are four hours left before the god-killing arrow pierces her heart, Saori is on the brink of death. Meanwhile, Seiya meets Cleo, a mysterious woman who learns about Saori's crisis.

title: Aiolos's Last Word
overview: Seiya and the other Bronze Knights encounter an unexpected enemy, Aiolos, the Gold Knight of Sagittarius. The four end up being transported to their respective training camps...

title: A Leap of Faith
overview: Just as they pass through the House of Capricorn, Dragon Shiryu becomes separated from Seiya and his companions as a huge crack tears through the earth...

title: Absolute Zero
overview: Hyoga confronts his master, the Gold Knight of Aquarius, Camus, and challenges him to a battle for his life.

title: Demon Roses
overview: Shun and Seiya arrive at the House of Pisces. There, Shun tells Seiya to move on, while he faces Aphrodite, the Gold Knight who killed his master Daedalus.

title: Andromeda's Sacrifice
overview: In the House of Pisces, Andromeda Shaun continues her life-and-death battle against her master’s killer, Gold Knight Aphrodite. In the midst of the struggle, Shaun flashes back to the events in her past that molded her and made her who she is.

title: Death Match in the Grand Master’s Chambers
overview: Seiya is near-death, downed by the deadly Demon Roses. He must find a way to stay alive and survive as he nears his goal - to reach the Grand Master.

title: The Man with Two Faces
overview: As the final flame on the clock tower is about to burn out, Seiya confronts the Grand Master and discovers his shocking true identity. In the face of the Grand Master’s overwhelming power, Seiya must dig deep if he hopes for any chance of victory.

title: The Face of the Grand Master
overview: Phoenix Nero returns to join the battle against the Grand Master. The two battle as more secrets are revealed about the Grand Master’s fate. But as both Sienna and Seiya lie near-death, is it all too little too late?

title: To Save Athena!
overview: At the top of Sanctuary, time has almost run out and the epic battle is nearly ended. Now the fate of the universe hangs in the balance as Seiya makes one final desperate attempt to save Saori.
